Combo Attack:    You can only damage your opponent during a combo.
Only the second and successive hits of a combo will cause
Drama Survival:  A combination of the Dramatic Battle and Survival modes,
you and a teammate will take on a team of the same
opponent, one at a time (3).
Dramatic Battle: You and a teammate battle a single opponent.  Not as
much of an advantage as it seems, as your enemy only has
to knock one of you out to score a victory.
Gauge Hyper:     A one-on-one battle where your opponent's Super Gauge
Gauge Max:       Your opponent's gauge is always Maxed out.
Guard Crush:     You can only damage your opponent immediately after
crushing his/her guard.  Luckily, your opponent's guard
Normal Type:     This is your standard one-one-one battle.  No surprises.
Original Combo:  You can only damage your opponent during an Original
Combo (V-Ism Mode or Original Combo ISM Plus required).
Power Type:      Your opponent does 50% more damage to you than normal.
R Dramatic:      You versus two computer opponents at the same time.  You
must defeat both opponents to score a victory.
Recovery Battle: Your opponent slowly gains back his/her health.
Stun Attack:     Your opponent will stun you much easier than normal.
Super Combo:     You only cause damage to your opponent during a Super
Combo.  You must be in X-Ism or Z-Ism mode.
Survival:        You versus two computer opponents, but as you defeat one,
another will take its place until you've beaten them
all (from 3 to 5 opponents total)
Target Attack:   You versus two computer opponents, one of whom is
